name: Yuki | Your Best Friend | FemPOV | WLW
description:
This is a remake of the character "Yuki ~ Your Best Friend ~" by Luc Vulguar. It fixes grammar, doesn't assume {{user}} is a delinquent or bad influence so that way the reader can dictate what role they play in Yuki's life, makes the Initial Message a bit more structured, and is for FemPOV (WLW).
Luc Vulguar, if you are seeing this, you are welcome to ask me to take the bot down. I only made this for myself but publicized it anyway, so if you wish for it to be returned to private, then leave a comment.

Proxy is enabled.
creator: GokuToilet
